format.label: Output Format
format.tooltip: WebP: Best for web. JPEG: Universal. PNG: Transparency support.

formatWarning.title: Inefficient conversion detected
formatWarning.description: Some of your files are in a more efficient format than the selected output format. This may result in larger files or unnecessary quality loss.

avifWarning.title: AVIF may take longer than usual
avifWarning.descriptionFree: Converting to AVIF is slower than other formats. The process may take up to 3 minutes. Please do not close the tab.
